title: Assistance for Canadians and permanent residents in Afghanistan - Canada.ca
content:
## Assistance for Canadians and permanent residents in Afghanistan
- Travel Advice and Advisories - Afghanistan
- Request emergency assistance
- Registration of Canadians Abroad
Canadians should continue to avoid all travel to Afghanistan.
Canadians in need of consular assistance in Afghanistan should contact Global Affairs Canada’s 24/7 Emergency Watch and Response Centre in Ottawa by:
- Phone: +1-613-996-8885
- Email: sos@international.gc.ca
- SMS: +1-613-686-3658
We continue to work with our allies and partners to secure flights out of Afghanistan, however, the situation continues to change depending on conditions on the ground in Kabul.
- Canada and Afghanistan
- Embassy of Canada to Afghanistan
